offer: For Etsy sellers processing 5–15 invoices/month, cash flow gaps cause late orders. We provide real-time cash flow monitoring instead of manual tracking through spreadsheets.
problem: Etsy sellers struggle with cash flow management, especially when approaching overdraft limits.
channels_free: Post in Reddit communities for Etsy sellers
Share insights on Indie Hackers forums
DM 20-50 Etsy sellers with a demo video
Engage in community groups for Etsy tools
try_it: Let users try Daily cash flow monitoring and Simple dashboard for cash flow overview on 1-3 items
pay: unknown with a clear upgrade path
cheap_execution_checklist: Create a 1-page landing page with CTA
Produce a short demo video of the workflow
Conduct 10 short interviews with target users
Provide early-access onboarding for first 10 users
Share weekly progress updates in relevant communities
automation_simplification_ideas: Enable CSV import for existing data
Allow one-click export of simple reports
